arts.ttl: Di Marzio: Milan Explore Joao Felix Transfer, Chelsea Declines Loan Offer
arts.sum: AC Milan are actively pursuing new talent as they navigate the January transfer window, with Portuguese forward Joao Felix emerging as a potential target. According to Gianluca Di Marzio, the Rossoneri have made initial inquiries to Chelsea regarding Felix, but the Premier League club has firmly stated that they are not open to loaning out the player at this time. arts.ttl: Juventus vs AC Milan to light up MD21
arts.sum: Juventus have kept a clean sheet in their last three league games against Milan (W1 D2), while they have never kept four clean sheets in a row against the Rossoneri in Serie A. In this Serie A campaign, Juventus have dropped points from a winning position in seven games.

arts.ttl: Juventus and Randal Kolo Muani: Why the Transfer Announcement is Delayed
arts.sum: As the January transfer window progresses, Juventus fans are eagerly awaiting the official announcement regarding the signing of Randal Kolo Muani from Paris Saint-Germain. However, despite widespread anticipation, the confirmation of this transfer has yet to materialize, leaving many to wonder about the reasons behind the delay. arts.ttl: Milan’s Sergio Conceição Prepares for Juventus Showdown
arts.sum: As AC Milan gear up for a crucial clash against Juventus, head coach Sergio Conceição addressed the media in a press conference at Milanello.
